requirements.full_sentence: 1.2.1 The currency chests should invariably report all transactions through CyM - CC portal on the same day by 7 pm.
requirements.object: through CyM - CC portal on the same day by 7 pm

requirements.full_sentence:
2.1.1 Delay in Reporting
In the event of delay in reporting currency chest transactions, penal interest at the rate indicated in paragraph 4 of this circular shall be levied on the amount due from the chest holding bank for the period of delay.
requirements.object: amount due from the chest holding bank for the period of delay

requirements.full_sentence: Penal interest shall be calculated on T+0 basis i.e.
requirements.object: basis i

requirements.full_sentence: penal interest shall be levied in respect of transactions not reported by currency chests to the Issue Office on the same business day within the time limit prescribed above.
requirements.object: of transactions not reported by currency chests to the Issue Office on the same business day within the time limit prescribed abo

requirements.full_sentence:
2.1.2 Wrong reporting
Penal interest shall be levied in respect of cases of wrong reporting in the same manner till the date of receipt of corrected advice by Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: of cases of wrong reporting in the same manner till the date of receipt of corrected advice by Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence: As debits/credits to banks' current accounts are raised on the basis of the transactions reported by the currency chests, penal interest shall invariably be levied in all cases of wrong reporting by the currency chests.
requirements.object: all cases of wrong reporting by the currency chests

requirements.full_sentence: Particular care shall be taken to ensure that remittances of fresh notes/re-issuable notes sent to the currency chests from RBI/press are not reported as 'deposit' transactions.
requirements.object: that remittances of fresh notes/re-issuable notes sent to the currency chests from RBI/press are not reported as 'deposit' transact

requirements.full_sentence: (i) Penal interest shall be levied in all cases where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with Reserve Bank on account of wrong reporting / delayed reporting / non-reporting of transactions.
requirements.object: cases where the bank has enjoyed 'ineligible' credit in its current account with Reserve Bank on account of wrong reporting / delayed

conditions: If such amounts are included in the chest balances
requirements.full_sentence: If such amounts are included in the chest balances, these shall be treated as instances of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest at the rate specified in paragraph 4.
requirements.object: of wrong reporting and shall attract penal interest at the rate specified in paragraph 4

requirements.full_sentence: (iii) In all the above cases (excepting shortages in chest balances / remittances, shortages due to pilferage / frauds, counterfeit banknotes detected in chest balances / remittances), penal interest shall be levied from the date of inclusion of 'ineligible' amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances.
requirements.object: date of inclusion of 'ineligible' amounts in chest balances till the exclusion of such amounts from chest balances

requirements.full_sentence:
Withdrawn
Penal measures for shortages in chest balances / remittances, shortages due to pilferage / frauds, counterfeit banknotes detected in chest balances / remittances shall be taken on the basis of prevailing "Scheme of Penalties".
requirements.object: basis of prevailing "Scheme of Penalties"

requirements.full_sentence:
3.1 Reporting of soiled note remittances to RBI
Soiled note remittances to RBI shall not be shown as withdrawal by chest(s).
requirements.object: by chest(s)

conditions: In case such remittances to RBI are wrongly reported as 'withdrawal'
requirements.full_sentence: In case such remittances to RBI are wrongly reported as 'withdrawal', a penalty of ₹50,000 shall be levied irrespective of the value of remittance and period of such wrong reporting.
requirements.object: the value of remittance and period of such wrong reporting

requirements.full_sentence: The CC sending the diversion should initiate the diversion entry.
The receiving CC should acknowledge the same.
Diversions should not be reported as deposit/withdrawal.
A penalty of ₹50,000 shall be levied for any such wrong reporting.
requirements.object: such wrong reporting

requirements.full_sentence:
3.3 Delayed reporting where currency chests had "Net Deposit"
Penal interest at the prevailing rate for delayed reporting of the instances where the currency chest had reported "net deposit" shall not be charged.

However, in order to ensure proper discipline in reporting currency chest transactions, a flat penalty of ₹50,000
shall be levied on the currency chests for delayed reporting, irrespective of the value of net deposit.
requirements.object: currency chests for delayed reporting, irrespective of the value of net deposit

requirements.full_sentence:
Rate of penal interest
Penal interest shall be levied at the rate of 2% over the prevailing Bank Rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/non-reporting /inclusion of ineligible amounts in chest balances.
requirements.object: rate of 2% over the prevailing Bank Rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/non-reporting /inclusion of ineligible a

requirements.full_sentence:
5.1 Competent Authority
The Competent Authority to decide the nature of irregularity shall be the Officer-in- Charge of the Issue Department of the Regional Office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting currency chest is located.
requirements.object: of the Issue Department of the Regional Office under whose jurisdiction the defaulting currency chest is located

requirements.full_sentence: 5.2.1 As the sole criterion for levy of penal interest/ penalty for delayed reporting is the number of days of delay, there should ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve Bank's decision.
requirements.object: for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve Bank's decision

requirements.full_sentence: However, representations, if any, on account of genuine difficulties faced by currency chests especially in hilly/remote areas and those affected by natural calamities, etc., may be made to the Regional Director/Chief General Manager/Officer-in-Charge of the Regional Office concerned through the Head / Controlling office of the bank within a month from the date of debit.
requirements.object: Regional Director/Chief General Manager/Officer-in-Charge of the Regional Office concerned through the Head / Controlling office of the

requirements.full_sentence: 5.2.2 In the case of wrong reporting representations for waiver shall not be considered.

5.2.3 As the intention behind the levy of penal interest/ penalty is to inculcate discipline among banks so as to ensure prompt/correct reporting, requests by banks for waiver of penal interest on grounds that delayed/wrong/non-reporting did not result in utilization of the Reserve Bank's funds or shortfall in the maintenance of CRR/SLR or that they were the result of clerical mistakes, unintentional or arithmetical errors, first time error, inexperience of staff etc., shall not be considered as valid grounds for waiver of penal interest.
requirements.object: grounds for waiver of penal interest
